Activewear

Activewear Manufacturer in Pakistan: Custom Performance Wear From 50 Pieces

✎ FABRIOZA Team 📅 July 1, 2026 ☕ 10 min read
Home / Blog / Activewear Manufacturer in Pakistan: Custom Performance Wear From 50 Pieces

Activewear demands performance fabrics, precise construction, and durability that withstands repeated washing and intense movement. At FABRIOZA, we manufacture custom activewear from 50 pieces with moisture-wicking fabrics, 4-way stretch technology, and construction designed for athletes.

What Is Activewear Manufacturing?

Activewear combines fashion with function. Unlike basic apparel, activewear must manage moisture, provide support, allow full range of motion, and maintain shape after hundreds of wear cycles. This requires specialized fabrics, construction techniques, and quality standards.

Products Available

  • Yoga Wear: High-waist leggings, supportive bras, flowing tops — soft, stretchy, opaque
  • Pilates Apparel: Form-fitting pieces that stay in place during floor work
  • Running Gear: Lightweight singlets, reflective details, compression shorts
  • CrossFit/HIIT: Durable fabrics, reinforced seams, maximum flexibility
  • Compression Wear: Graduated compression for circulation and recovery
  • Lounge-to-Gym: Versatile pieces that work for both workouts and casual wear

Performance Fabrics Available

  • Polyester-Spandex (88/12): The industry standard — moisture-wicking, quick-dry, 4-way stretch
  • Nylon-Spandex (82/18): Softer hand feel, preferred for yoga and premium leggings
  • Recycled Polyester (rPET): Sustainable option made from post-consumer plastic bottles
  • Bamboo-Blend: Naturally antibacterial, eco-friendly, incredibly soft

Women's Activewear Guide

Women's activewear is the largest segment. Key considerations: high-waist bands (stay in place during movement), squat-proof opacity, hidden pockets (phone/key storage), and removable bra padding. Seamless construction is trending for a smooth, second-skin feel.

Men's Activewear Guide

Men's activewear focuses on: tapered fits (no excess fabric), breathable mesh panels, secure pockets, and anti-odor treatments. The men's market is growing rapidly with significant opportunity for new brands.

Compression Wear Manufacturing

Compression garments require precise gradient pressure — tightest at the extremities, gradually loosening toward the core. Our pattern makers understand compression construction and produce garments that deliver real performance benefits, not just a tight fit.

Private Label Activewear Branding

Full private label services: woven labels, printed care instructions, hangtags, branded polybags, and custom mailer packaging. Your activewear arrives retail-ready.

Launch Strategy for Activewear Brand

Start with a 3-piece collection: one hero bottom (leggings or shorts), one hero top (sports bra or tank), and one layering piece (hoodie or jacket). 50 pieces per style. Test, gather feedback, and expand your range based on what sells.

Launch Your Activewear Line With FABRIOZA

50 pieces minimum. Performance fabrics. Free quote in 24 hours.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the best fabric for yoga leggings?

Nylon-spandex (82/18) offers the best combination of softness, stretch, and opacity for yoga.

Do you offer seamless activewear?

Yes, seamless leggings and sports bras are available for 100+ piece orders.

Can I get recycled/eco-friendly fabrics?

Yes, we offer rPET (recycled polyester) and bamboo-blend fabrics for sustainable activewear brands.

What is the MOQ for activewear?

50 pieces per style. You can mix sizes and up to 3 colors within that minimum.

How do I test fabric performance?

We provide fabric swatches with every sample order. Test for stretch, moisture-wicking, and opacity before approving.
